# in(_:)

**Type Method**

Matches if the process is running as any of the specified platform types or if the file supports any of the specified platform types.

## Declaration

```swift
static func `in`(_ values: [PlatformType.DataType]) -> PlatformType.OutType
```
title: in(_:)
